raw_text: Absolute disaster of an app. For an order 'they' made a mistake of sending one product instead of another. For that single order, we have been trying get a resolution since 3 days. Support is unavailable and if you write an email, they increase problems instead of reducing it. Again, most emails are also automated responses.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Blinkit is an excellent app for quick grocery delivery. The app is easy to use, delivery is usually very fast, and the products arrive in good condition. I like the wide variety of items available and the convenient ordering process. It saves a lot of time and makes shopping hassle-free. Highly recommended!

Canceled an item a month ago and still haven't received my refund! I have been following up constantly for over a month now, but there is zero proper guidance or accountability. Spoke to multiple customer service agents in between, but got nothing but generic, useless responses. Blinkit is quick to grab your money but completely ghosts you when they owe you a refund. Extremely pathetic post-purchase service and support. Refund my hard-earned money immediately! need my refund immediately!

Very poor unmeasured app, price more than market price, no coupons, discounts ,payment providers offer higher order price, if you guys continue like this the app will not workout long timebecause of no attraction on app just i checked and left out because of nothing special on this app. Just one side profit gaining business, recently one warehouse opened in Kurmannapalem, if the app is continued like this very hard to get rentals and salaries also, poor app marketing without customer attractions

i have ordered headphones and payment was already done but suddenly it was out of stock and still I didn't get my refund yet , and when I try to call costumer Care they are declining my call and when I try to chat through app I can't text them , they are giving an option to choose message ,we can't type our own issues ...waste...

The app shows unavailable service, but it's working for other locations but when I order in day time it works perfectly, blinkit should work on it , this is not how you serve people, my store is just 950 meters away but still I'm not able to make orders, while the other apps like zepto and Swiggy taking orders. after using blinkit for about 3/4 years, I'm done .

It is a terrible experience they always scam regarding the time and product and brag when they deliver on time. blinkit is better if you can wait but don't trust the product to be delivered on time and check the quality after delivery, I used to like it so much in beginning that I used it to even order what I can get easily whithin 5-10 minutes but now I'm just getting fed-up. thank you blinkit....

I would like to bring to your notice that my recent order is not being displayed properly in the order history, and the details appear to be incomplete. Additionally, I have received an incorrect size for the vest in this order. Since the order itself is not fully visible in my account, I am unable to initiate a proper return or exchange.

I absolutely love this app it's so clean and intuitive and the service is probably one of the best I've had slight issues with my orders they were solved so quickly by the support staff they're exceptional but a slight issue I faced was when I was trying to tip my delivery partner after the delivery I tried multiple times and really wanted to tip that person because they were extremely sweet but I wasn't able to as it got stuck on loading screen

not good service. Sometimes they don't even send the items and when we check and we notice an item is missing and then you inform them. that's when they will tell you that the item is out of stock. You have to remind them. also known for sending old used items also. so keep checking what they deliver.

Blinkit is one of the most convenient shopping apps I've used. The interface is simple and user-friendly, making it easy to find products and place orders. It offers a wide variety of groceries, household essentials, snacks, and more, all in one place. The quick delivery service is a huge advantage, especially when you need something urgently. Overall, Blinkit saves time and makes everyday shopping fast, easy, and hassle-free. Highly recommended!

absolutely trash app , it takes advantage of those who are in need , when you start ordering for the 3th-4th time from this app it will increase the price of the product that is less at the beginning, it took the concept of dynamic pricing to next level, and also the handling fees increased with time , one time I got the product direct im my hand without packaging good part is that it take less time to dilivery and cod is available consistently, but blinkit I am very disappointed.

Blinkit's service is very poor. Today, I ordered a product after carefully reading its details, which clearly mentioned that it contained 3 blades. However, when I received the order, there was only 1 blade inside. I immediately raised a complaint, but in the end, I was told that neither Blinkit nor the shop was at fault. In my opinion, this is clearly Blinkit's mistake because the product information shown on the app was misleading. Therefore, I consider Blinkit to be a very disappointing app.

I really don’t like the Blinkit app. When I shop for less than ₹200, they charge so many extra fees that after seeing the total, I don’t feel like ordering anything. So I switch to JioMart or just go to the market to buy what I need...that’s why I deleted the app and don’t buy anything from it anymore.

They have a wide range of products that I like. Whenever I am trying to cook something new and don't have enough time to go out and fetch the ingredients I rely on Blinkit. They have alot of imported product and they make it easy by delivery at home. very reliable when cooking international cuisine.

Good app for daily needs like groceries, fruits, snacks, stationery, etc. Delivery is fast too. But the “free delivery” claim feels misleading because they almost always add a ₹30 surge fee at checkout. Extra charges should be shown clearly from the start.

Blinkit is honestly a lifesaver when you need stuff fast. I’ve got milk, snacks, even ice cream delivered in like 8 minutes at midnight. The app is easy and reordering is quick too. But it’s not perfect. Delivery is free only above ₹200, so small orders cost extra. Stuff goes out of stock a lot on weekends, and veggies aren’t always fresh. Prices are a bit higher than our local shops. Still, for last-minute things, it’s super handy. Just don’t use it for monthly grocery.

"I ordered 2 items from this app and actually received 1 extra item. However, when the order was delivered at night and I opened it the next day, the free Surf Excel liquid detergent that was part of the offer was missing. Their customer service is absolutely terrible and extremely unhelpful. They just send automated, bot-generated

service is good, boys & girls are exceptional, app is good but still a lot of items out of stock, tracking not par with insta and can extend your delivery limits., every time I have travel 500mts to collect my orders (insta delivers at my door step) . But about rest above all Blinkit has more varieties and range of products to avail than Instamart.

“Really impressed with Blinkit! The delivery is super fast, products are fresh, and the app is very easy to use. I’ve ordered groceries, snacks, and daily essentials multiple times, and the experience has always been smooth. The delivery partners are polite and orders usually arrive before the expected time. Very convenient for busy schedules. Highly recommended!”
